---
title: "Contact"
---

## Email

The fastest way to reach me is by email. Write to **andrew dot rosenberg [at] ufl dot edu** — translate the brackets and "dot" into a normal address before sending. (The obfuscation is here to keep harvesters from scraping the page.)

If you are a prospective Ph.D. student, please include your research interests and a brief description of what drew you to my work.

## Office

**333 Anderson Hall**\
Department of Political Science\
University of Florida\
Gainesville, FL 32611

```{=html}
<div class="map-wrap">
<iframe
  src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=-82.349%2C29.644%2C-82.339%2C29.654&layer=mapnik&marker=29.6489%2C-82.3437"
  loading="lazy"
  title="Anderson Hall, University of Florida"></iframe>
<p class="map-attribution"><a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=29.6489&amp;mlon=-82.3437#map=17/29.6489/-82.3437" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View larger map</a> · © OpenStreetMap contributors</p>
</div>
```
